purpose: Creates a sequence to indicate the erection of members at stages.  Reports will be generated.

Content: Erection sequence is a tool that assigns an erection stage and sequence number to the assembles UDA’s in the sequence order to the picked parts. User can  enter the stage number in the tool to run as a video. Can change the sequence number in the user defined attribute. Delete option is also provided to the selected assemblies. Report can be generated for stages for more information and purpose of erection.

package_content: TSEP package (Objects_number.inp for Erection UDA’s is in-built)
download_process: Once You purchase the tool, a link will be sent to your mail to download.
installation_process: Double click on the installation Package
System will show installed Tekla Versions on your system
Choose the version(s) to be installed.
Close the Application. (Do not Delete the File)
It will be queued for the installation when Tekla is open next time.
Application will be installed before opening the software.
Search for Erection Sequence under Application and Components.
Run the Tool and Select assemblies one by one
Let the Application do the magic
